Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 194 

PTNT_ADD_ON_PYMT_AMT 

LABEL: Patient Add-On Payment Amount (new patient) 

DESCRIPTION: This field represents a base rate increase factor for 1.3516 for new patient initial preventive physical 
examination (IPPE) and annual wellness visit. 

SHORT NAME: PTNT_ADD_ON_PYMT_AMT 

LONG NAME: PTNT_ADD_ON_PYMT_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field is derived by
